predicate_mappings.restraint_kit_assigned: restraint kit has been assigned to {} with the kit {}

preconditions: I can only register a patient case A if it is not the case that the case A is registered and it is not the case that A is admitted to the safe room
effects: Once I register a patient case A, it is the case that the case A is registered

assign_intake_assessor.description: assign a patient case A to an intake assessor B
preconditions: I can only assign a patient case A to an intake assessor B if it is the case that the case A is registered and B is available and B is eligible for the case A
I can only assign a patient case A to an intake assessor B if it is not the case that the assessment for A is in progress
effects: Once I assign a patient case A to an intake assessor B, it is the case that the patient case A is assigned to the intake assessor B and the assessment for A is in progress
Once I assign a patient case A to an intake assessor B, it is not the case anymore that B is available

release_intake_assessor.description: release an intake assessor B from a patient case A
preconditions: I can only release an intake assessor B from a patient case A if it is the case that the patient case A is assigned to the intake assessor B
I can only release an intake assessor B from a patient case A if it is not the case that the evaluation for A is authorized and it is not the case that the team is confirmed ready for A
effects: Once I release an intake assessor B from a patient case A, it is the case that B is available

Once I release an intake assessor B from a patient case A, it is not the case anymore that the patient case A is assigned to the intake assessor B and it is not the case anymore that the assessment for A is in progress and it is not the case anymore that safety measures are in place for A and it is not the case anymore that clinical preparation is complete for A and it is not the case anymore that security is on the scene for A and it is not the case anymore that A is ready for transfer and it is not the case anymore that A requires enhanced monitoring

assign_observation_bed.description: assign an observation bed B to a patient case A for observation
preconditions: I can only assign an observation bed B to a patient case A for observation if it is the case that the case A is registered and B is available
effects: Once I assign an observation bed B to a patient case A for observation, it is the case that B is assigned to A for observation
Once I assign an observation bed B to a patient case A for observation, it is not the case anymore that B is available

release_observation_bed.description: release an observation bed B from a patient case A
preconditions: I can only release an observation bed B from a patient case A if it is the case that B is assigned to A for observation
effects: Once I release an observation bed B from a patient case A, it is the case that B is available
Once I release an observation bed B from a patient case A, it is not the case anymore that B is assigned to A for observation

confirm_safety_measures_with_bed.description: confirm safety measures for a patient case A with an observation bed B
preconditions: I can only confirm safety measures for a patient case A with an observation bed B if it is the case that the case A is registered and the assessment for A is in progress and B is assigned to A for observation
I can only confirm safety measures for a patient case A with an observation bed B if it is not the case that safety measures are in place for A
effects: Once I confirm safety measures for a patient case A with an observation bed B, it is the case that safety measures are in place for A

assign_security_officer.description: assign a security officer B to a patient case A for safety measures
preconditions: I can only assign a security officer B to a patient case A for safety measures if it is the case that the case A is registered and the assessment for A is in progress and B is available
I can only assign a security officer B to a patient case A for safety measures if it is not the case that safety measures are in place for A
effects: Once I assign a security officer B to a patient case A for safety measures, it is the case that safety measures are in place for A and security is on the scene for A
Once I assign a security officer B to a patient case A for safety measures, it is not the case anymore that B is available

senior_clinician_finalize_preparation.description: finalize clinical preparation for a patient case A with a senior clinician C at an observation bed B
preconditions: I can only finalize clinical preparation for a patient case A with a senior clinician C at an observation bed B if it is the case that safety measures are in place for A and the assessment for A is in progress and B is assigned to A for observation and C is available
I can only finalize clinical preparation for a patient case A with a senior clinician C at an observation bed B if it is not the case that clinical preparation is complete for A
effects: Once I finalize clinical preparation for a patient case A with a senior clinician C at an observation bed B, it is the case that clinical preparation is complete for A
Once I finalize clinical preparation for a patient case A with a senior clinician C at an observation bed B, it is not the case anymore that security is on the scene for A

confirm_preparation_for_room_assignment.description: confirm preparation for room assignment of a patient case A to a safe room B
preconditions: I can only confirm preparation for room assignment of a patient case A to a safe room B if it is the case that the assessment for A is in progress and a safe room allocation has been confirmed for A in B
I can only confirm preparation for room assignment of a patient case A to a safe room B if it is not the case that clinical preparation is complete for A
effects: Once I confirm preparation for room assignment of a patient case A to a safe room B, it is the case that clinical preparation is complete for A
Once I confirm preparation for room assignment of a patient case A to a safe room B, it is not the case anymore that security is on the scene for A

assign_medication_order_set.description: assign a medication order set B to a patient case A
preconditions: I can only assign a medication order set B to a patient case A if it is the case that the case A is registered and B is available and B is compatible with the case A
effects: Once I assign a medication order set B to a patient case A, it is the case that medication has been assigned to A with the order set B
Once I assign a medication order set B to a patient case A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

release_medication_order_set.description: release a medication order set B from a patient case A
preconditions: I can only release a medication order set B from a patient case A if it is the case that medication has been assigned to A with the order set B
effects: Once I release a medication order set B from a patient case A, it is the case that B is available
Once I release a medication order set B from a patient case A, it is not the case anymore that medication has been assigned to A with the order set B

assign_restraint_kit.description: assign a restraint kit B to a patient case A
preconditions: I can only assign a restraint kit B to a patient case A if it is the case that the case A is registered and B is available and B is compatible with the case A
effects: Once I assign a restraint kit B to a patient case A, it is the case that restraint kit has been assigned to A with the kit B
Once I assign a restraint kit B to a patient case A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

release_restraint_kit.description: release a restraint kit B from a patient case A
preconditions: I can only release a restraint kit B from a patient case A if it is the case that restraint kit has been assigned to A with the kit B
effects: Once I release a restraint kit B from a patient case A, it is the case that B is available
Once I release a restraint kit B from a patient case A, it is not the case anymore that restraint kit has been assigned to A with the kit B

assign_transport_service.description: assign a transport service B to a patient case A
preconditions: I can only assign a transport service B to a patient case A if it is the case that the case A is registered and B is available and B is compatible with the case A
effects: Once I assign a transport service B to a patient case A, it is the case that transport service has been assigned to A with the service B
Once I assign a transport service B to a patient case A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

release_transport_service.description: release a transport service B from a patient case A
preconditions: I can only release a transport service B from a patient case A if it is the case that transport service has been assigned to A with the service B
effects: Once I release a transport service B from a patient case A, it is the case that B is available
Once I release a transport service B from a patient case A, it is not the case anymore that transport service has been assigned to A with the service B

assign_isolation_resource.description: assign an isolation resource B to a patient case A
preconditions: I can only assign an isolation resource B to a patient case A if it is the case that the case A is registered and B is available and B is compatible with the case A
effects: Once I assign an isolation resource B to a patient case A, it is the case that isolation resource has been assigned to A with the resource B
Once I assign an isolation resource B to a patient case A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

release_isolation_resource.description: release an isolation resource B from a patient case A
preconditions: I can only release an isolation resource B from a patient case A if it is the case that isolation resource has been assigned to A with the resource B
effects: Once I release an isolation resource B from a patient case A, it is the case that B is available
Once I release an isolation resource B from a patient case A, it is not the case anymore that isolation resource has been assigned to A with the resource B

assign_psychiatric_evaluator_for_evaluat.description: assign a psychiatric evaluator B for evaluation of a patient case A with a medication order set C and a restraint kit D
preconditions: I can only assign a psychiatric evaluator B for evaluation of a patient case A with a medication order set C and a restraint kit D if it is the case that the assessment for A is in progress and medication has been assigned to A with the order set C and restraint kit has been assigned to A with the kit D and B is available and B is eligible for the case A
I can only assign a psychiatric evaluator B for evaluation of a patient case A with a medication order set C and a restraint kit D if it is not the case that the evaluation for A is authorized
effects: Once I assign a psychiatric evaluator B for evaluation of a patient case A with a medication order set C and a restraint kit D, it is the case that B has been assigned as the evaluator for A and the evaluation for A is authorized
Once I assign a psychiatric evaluator B for evaluation of a patient case A with a medication order set C and a restraint kit D, it is not the case anymore that B is available

assign_evaluator_with_transport_and_reso.description: assign a psychiatric evaluator B with a transport service C and a transport equipment D for evaluation of a patient case A
preconditions: I can only assign a psychiatric evaluator B with a transport service C and a transport equipment D for evaluation of a patient case A if it is the case that the assessment for A is in progress and transport service has been assigned to A with the service C and D is available and B is available and B is eligible for the case A and D is compatible with the case A
I can only assign a psychiatric evaluator B with a transport service C and a transport equipment D for evaluation of a patient case A if it is not the case that the evaluation for A is authorized
effects: Once I assign a psychiatric evaluator B with a transport service C and a transport equipment D for evaluation of a patient case A, it is the case that B has been assigned as the evaluator for A and the evaluation for A is authorized and A requires enhanced monitoring and security is on the scene for A

Once I assign a psychiatric evaluator B with a transport service C and a transport equipment D for evaluation of a patient case A, it is not the case anymore that B is available and it is not the case anymore that D is available

finalize_pre_evaluation_coordination.description: finalize pre evaluation coordination for a patient case A with a medication order set B and a restraint kit C
preconditions: I can only finalize pre evaluation coordination for a patient case A with a medication order set B and a restraint kit C if it is the case that the evaluation for A is authorized and A requires enhanced monitoring and medication has been assigned to A with the order set B and restraint kit has been assigned to A with the kit C
effects: Once I finalize pre evaluation coordination for a patient case A with a medication order set B and a restraint kit C, it is not the case anymore that A requires enhanced monitoring and it is not the case anymore that security is on the scene for A

confirm_nursing_team_ready.description: confirm nursing team a nursing team D is ready for a patient case A with a medication order set B and a restraint kit C
preconditions: I can only confirm nursing team a nursing team D is ready for a patient case A with a medication order set B and a restraint kit C if it is the case that clinical preparation is complete for A and the evaluation for A is authorized and medication has been assigned to A with the order set B and restraint kit has been assigned to A with the kit C and D is available for the case A

I can only confirm nursing team a nursing team D is ready for a patient case A with a medication order set B and a restraint kit C if it is not the case that security is on the scene for A and it is not the case that the team is confirmed ready for A
effects: Once I confirm nursing team a nursing team D is ready for a patient case A with a medication order set B and a restraint kit C, it is the case that the team is confirmed ready for A

confirm_psychiatry_team_ready_and_set_se.description: confirm psychiatry team a psychiatry team D is ready and set security for a patient case A with a transport service B and an isolation resource C
preconditions: I can only confirm psychiatry team a psychiatry team D is ready and set security for a patient case A with a transport service B and an isolation resource C if it is the case that clinical preparation is complete for A and the evaluation for A is authorized and transport service has been assigned to A with the service B and isolation resource has been assigned to A with the resource C and D is available for the case A

I can only confirm psychiatry team a psychiatry team D is ready and set security for a patient case A with a transport service B and an isolation resource C if it is not the case that the team is confirmed ready for A
effects: Once I confirm psychiatry team a psychiatry team D is ready and set security for a patient case A with a transport service B and an isolation resource C, it is the case that the team is confirmed ready for A and security is on the scene for A

prepare_for_transfer.description: prepare a patient case A for transfer with a medication order set B and a restraint kit C
preconditions: I can only prepare a patient case A for transfer with a medication order set B and a restraint kit C if it is the case that the team is confirmed ready for A and security is on the scene for A and medication has been assigned to A with the order set B and restraint kit has been assigned to A with the kit C
effects: Once I prepare a patient case A for transfer with a medication order set B and a restraint kit C, it is the case that A is ready for transfer

Once I prepare a patient case A for transfer with a medication order set B and a restraint kit C, it is not the case anymore that security is on the scene for A and it is not the case anymore that clinical preparation is complete for A and it is not the case anymore that A requires enhanced monitoring

reconfirm_clinical_preparation.description: reconfirm clinical preparation for a patient case A with an observation bed B and a senior clinician C
preconditions: I can only reconfirm clinical preparation for a patient case A with an observation bed B and a senior clinician C if it is the case that A is ready for transfer and the team is confirmed ready for A and the assessment for A is in progress and B is assigned to A for observation and C is available
I can only reconfirm clinical preparation for a patient case A with an observation bed B and a senior clinician C if it is not the case that clinical preparation is complete for A
effects: Once I reconfirm clinical preparation for a patient case A with an observation bed B and a senior clinician C, it is the case that clinical preparation is complete for A

confirm_observation_bed_ready.description: confirm that an observation bed B is ready for a patient case A
preconditions: I can only confirm that an observation bed B is ready for a patient case A if it is the case that the team is confirmed ready for A and clinical preparation is complete for A and B is assigned to A for observation
I can only confirm that an observation bed B is ready for a patient case A if it is not the case that security is on the scene for A and it is not the case that the observation bed is confirmed for A
effects: Once I confirm that an observation bed B is ready for a patient case A, it is the case that the observation bed is confirmed for A

assign_security_for_observation.description: assign a security officer B to a patient case A for observation
preconditions: I can only assign a security officer B to a patient case A for observation if it is the case that the team is confirmed ready for A and clinical preparation is complete for A and B is available
I can only assign a security officer B to a patient case A for observation if it is not the case that security is on the scene for A and it is not the case that the observation bed is confirmed for A
effects: Once I assign a security officer B to a patient case A for observation, it is the case that the observation bed is confirmed for A
Once I assign a security officer B to a patient case A for observation, it is not the case anymore that B is available

assign_safe_room_slot.description: assign a safe room B to a patient case A for a safe room slot
preconditions: I can only assign a safe room B to a patient case A for a safe room slot if it is the case that the observation bed is confirmed for A and B is available and A is eligible for a safe room slot in B
effects: Once I assign a safe room B to a patient case A for a safe room slot, it is the case that B is assigned to the case A
Once I assign a safe room B to a patient case A for a safe room slot, it is not the case anymore that B is available

bed_management_authorize_assignment.description: authorize a bed management officer A to assign a safe room C to a triage staff B for bed management
preconditions: I can only authorize a bed management officer A to assign a safe room C to a triage staff B for bed management if it is the case that the case A is registered and bed management review is needed for A and a bed management slot has been requested for A in C and C is assigned to the case B
I can only authorize a bed management officer A to assign a safe room C to a triage staff B for bed management if it is not the case that a safe room allocation has been confirmed for A in C
effects: Once I authorize a bed management officer A to assign a safe room C to a triage staff B for bed management, it is the case that a safe room allocation has been confirmed for A in C

mark_bed_management_flag.description: mark bed management flag for a patient case A with an observation bed B and a senior clinician C
preconditions: I can only mark bed management flag for a patient case A with an observation bed B and a senior clinician C if it is the case that the case A is registered and bed management review is needed for A and clinical preparation is complete for A and the observation bed is confirmed for A and B is assigned to A for observation and C is available
I can only mark bed management flag for a patient case A with an observation bed B and a senior clinician C if it is not the case that a bed assignment has been staged for A
effects: Once I mark bed management flag for a patient case A with an observation bed B and a senior clinician C, it is the case that a bed assignment has been staged for A

admit_case_via_preapproval.description: admit a patient case A via preapproval
preconditions: I can only admit a patient case A via preapproval if it is the case that bed management preapproval is required for A and the case A is registered and the assessment for A is in progress and the evaluation for A is authorized and the team is confirmed ready for A and the observation bed is confirmed for A and clinical preparation is complete for A
I can only admit a patient case A via preapproval if it is not the case that A is admitted to the safe room
effects: Once I admit a patient case A via preapproval, it is the case that A is admitted to the safe room

admit_case_with_room_assignment.description: admit a patient case A with room assignment to a safe room B
preconditions: I can only admit a patient case A with room assignment to a safe room B if it is the case that bed management review is needed for A and the case A is registered and the assessment for A is in progress and the evaluation for A is authorized and the team is confirmed ready for A and the observation bed is confirmed for A and clinical preparation is complete for A and a safe room allocation has been confirmed for A in B
I can only admit a patient case A with room assignment to a safe room B if it is not the case that A is admitted to the safe room
effects: Once I admit a patient case A with room assignment to a safe room B, it is the case that A is admitted to the safe room

admit_case_via_bed_assignment.description: admit a patient case A via bed assignment
preconditions: I can only admit a patient case A via bed assignment if it is the case that bed management review is needed for A and the case A is registered and the assessment for A is in progress and the evaluation for A is authorized and the team is confirmed ready for A and the observation bed is confirmed for A and clinical preparation is complete for A and a bed assignment has been staged for A
I can only admit a patient case A via bed assignment if it is not the case that A is admitted to the safe room
effects: Once I admit a patient case A via bed assignment, it is the case that A is admitted to the safe room

action_nl_templates.assign_intake_assessor: assign patient case {?patient_case} to intake assessor {?intake_assessor}
action_nl_templates.release_intake_assessor: release intake assessor {?intake_assessor} from patient case {?patient_case}
action_nl_templates.assign_observation_bed: assign observation bed {?observation_bed} to patient case {?patient_case} for observation
action_nl_templates.release_observation_bed: release observation bed {?observation_bed} from patient case {?patient_case}
action_nl_templates.confirm_safety_measures_with_bed: confirm safety measures for patient case {?patient_case} with observation bed {?observation_bed}
action_nl_templates.assign_security_officer: assign security officer {?security_officer} to patient case {?patient_case} for safety measures
action_nl_templates.senior_clinician_finalize_preparation: finalize clinical preparation for patient case {?patient_case} with senior clinician {?senior_clinician} at observation bed {?observation_bed}
action_nl_templates.confirm_preparation_for_room_assignment: confirm preparation for room assignment of patient case {?patient_case} to safe room {?safe_room}
action_nl_templates.assign_medication_order_set: assign medication order set {?medication_order_set} to patient case {?patient_case}
action_nl_templates.release_medication_order_set: release medication order set {?medication_order_set} from patient case {?patient_case}
action_nl_templates.assign_restraint_kit: assign restraint kit {?restraint_kit} to patient case {?patient_case}
action_nl_templates.release_restraint_kit: release restraint kit {?restraint_kit} from patient case {?patient_case}
action_nl_templates.assign_transport_service: assign transport service {?transport_service} to patient case {?patient_case}
action_nl_templates.release_transport_service: release transport service {?transport_service} from patient case {?patient_case}
action_nl_templates.assign_isolation_resource: assign isolation resource {?isolation_resource} to patient case {?patient_case}
action_nl_templates.release_isolation_resource: release isolation resource {?isolation_resource} from patient case {?patient_case}

action_nl_templates.assign_security_for_observation: assign security officer {?security_officer} to patient case {?patient_case} for observation
action_nl_templates.assign_safe_room_slot: assign safe room {?safe_room} to patient case {?patient_case} for a safe room slot

action_nl_templates.admit_case_via_bed_assignment: admit patient case {?patient_case} via bed assignment

type_hierarchy: Everything that is a patient case or a intake assessor or a psychiatric evaluator or a restraint kit or a medication order set or a transport service or a observation bed or a security officer or a safe room or a senior clinician or a transport equipment or a isolation resource or a clinical team type is also a object
Everything that is a nursing team or a psychiatry team is also a clinical team type
Everything that is a triage patient case or a bed management patient case is also a patient case
